headline: Dow Jones Hits High, AI Stocks Shrug Off Broadcom, Ciena Sell-Offs; Jobs Report Looms
summary: Dow Jones futures fell slightly after hours, along with S&P 500 futures and Nasdaq futures. The May jobs report is on tap before Friday's open. The stock market saw the Dow Jones jump to a record high, aided by lower oil prices and Treasury yields.

headline: Humana Jumps 6%, UnitedHealth Climbs 5%, Cigna Rises 4% as Analysts Cheer Softer Medical Cost Trends
summary: Health insurers are running higher in Thursday afternoon trading after a wave of bullish Wall Street analyst notes on the managed-care sector, centered on UnitedHealth, citing softer medical cost and utilization trends plus potential AI efficiency upside. Humana (NYSE:HUM) stock is leading the move, up 6% to $348, with UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) stock up 5% ... Humana Jumps 6%, UnitedHealth Climbs 5%, Cigna Rises 4% as Analysts Cheer Softer Medical Cost Trends

headline: UNH, CVS Lead S&P 500 Health Insurers Flashing Buy Signals
summary: UnitedHealth Group, CVS Health and other S&P 500 health insurance giant rallied on Thursday morning after price target hikes from Morgan Stanley and a UNH upgrade from BofA. The analysts highlighted moderating health care utilization trends and a tailwind to profitability from deploying AI.

headline: Brokers Suggest Investing in CVS Health (CVS): Read This Before Placing a Bet
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for CVS Health (CVS) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: Salesforce (CRM) Is Up 7.4% After Big Anthropic Bet And Agentforce Push – Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In late May 2026, Salesforce reported first-quarter fiscal 2027 results with revenue of US$11.13 billion and net income of US$2.11 billion, alongside updated full-year guidance and a US$0.44 quarterly dividend declaration. Around the same time, the company deepened its AI push with a roughly US$5 billion stake in Anthropic, the planned acquisition of Contentful, expanded Agentforce deployments with clients like CVS Health, and fresh equity capacity via a US$10.32 billion shelf registration...
